title: HAPITOIZ Magical Color Changing Mermaid Doll, Princess Mermaid Toy with Seahorse & Dolls Accessories - Mermaid Bath Toys
features: Color Change Princess Mermaid and Seahorse Toy - When the temperature reaches 82°F or above, the mermaid's fish tail magically transforms from a beautiful shade of purple to a vibrant shade of pink.This captivating transformation will surely captivate and entertain your child for hours on end.

This Mermaid Play Set includes one gorgeous 12'' mermaid doll, a delightful seahorse companion and various doll accessories, allowing for endless imaginative play. Create your own underwater adventures and let your imagination run wild!

With its bright and eye-catching colors, this mermaid doll is sure to stand out. The doll's lustrous purple hair adds an extra touch of glamour, making it the perfect gift for any mermaid enthusiast or princess lover.

Crafted from high-quality plastic ABS material, our Color Change Princess Mermaid and Seahorse Toy is built to last. Its durable construction ensures that it can withstand hours of playtime fun, making it a great addition to any toy collection. Get ready to dive into a world of magic and wonder with this extraordinary toy!

Not only is this mermaid doll a fantastic toy for imaginative play, but it also makes for a wonderful gift. Whether it's for a birthday,Christmas, holidays, or special occasions, this mermaid toy is sure to bring joy and excitement to any little girl's face. It's a present that will be cherished and treasured for years to come.
